ddls:
CREATE TABLE "interest_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interest rate */,
  "rate" REAL /* Interest rate value */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interest rate */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the interest rate became effective */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the interest rate is no longer effective */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the rate is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rate was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rate was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_terms" (
  "term_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan term */,
  "term" INTEGER /* Loan term value in years */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loan term */,
  "min_loan_amount" REAL /* Minimum loan amount for the term */,
  "max_loan_amount" REAL /* Maximum loan amount for the term */,
  "is_popular" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the term is popular */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the term was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the term was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_repayment_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan repayment schedule */,
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the interest rate */,
  "term_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the loan term */,
  "loan_amount" REAL /* The loan amount for which the repayment schedule is generated */,
  "monthly_payment" REAL /* Monthly repayment amount */,
  "total_interest_paid" REAL /* Total interest paid over the term of the loan */,
  "total_payment" REAL /* Total amount paid over the term of the loan */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the schedule was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the schedule was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_repayment_schedules_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("rate_id") REFERENCES interest_rates ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_repayment_schedules_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("term_id") REFERENCES loan_terms ("term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the loan repayment schedule */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., view, compare, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the interaction was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_schedule_id FOREIGN KEY ("schedule_id") REFERENCES loan_repayment_schedules ("schedule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email address */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
